title: vernonia cinerea var. parviflora
intro: Vernonia cinerea var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered ironweed, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Vernonia cinerea var. parviflora is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
